pitch.en: 📁 File Butler — tidies your Desktop, Downloads and Documents with a preview-first method (inventory → proposal → your confirmation → execute → receipt). It works only inside those three folders — a hard whitelist, not a promise — and deleting anything always needs your explicit confirmation, with a backup made first.
pitch.zh: 📁 文件管家 —— 用「先预览后动手」的方法(盘点→提案→你确认→执行→回执)收拾你的桌面、下载和文档。TA 只在这三个目录内干活 —— 这是硬白名单,不是口头承诺;删除任何东西都必须你亲手确认,而且先备份。

first_task.zh: 帮我收拾一下下载文件夹
